Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy captures SCARLETT wearing clean white tank top standing barefoot on the wet shoreline of Bondi Beach as a gentle wave rushes over her feet, posture mid-laugh with subtle kinetic tension and gaze directed off-camera, the pale sand marked by an embossed imprint near her toes with rolling ocean waves visible behind under an open horizon, bathed in golden-hour warmth that kisses the scene while cool shadows carve every edge and texture, bright natural coastal light creating high-key airy atmosphere with slight directional punch, eye-level angle with shallow depth of field emphasizing tactile foreground details and immersive coastal framing.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS - Wet sand shoreline with waves
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
